title: Notice of construction work on Louis Fourie Road between George Road and Marsh Street
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that the widening of the road embankment will commence on 29 September 2025 on Louis Fourie Road just south of George Rd intersection.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Please be advised that the widening of the road embankment will commence on 29 September 2025 on Louis Fourie Road just south of George Rd intersection."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during the 6-month construction period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction.","html":"Please drive carefully during this period of construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you.","html":"Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, for you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
